meaning: school of engineering; college of engineering
sentence: 他在工学院学习机械工程专业。
pinyin: Tā zài gōngxuéyuàn xuéxí jīxiè gōngchéng zhuānyè.
english: He studies mechanical engineering at the college of engineering.

meaning: to sum up; a roundup; a general narrative
sentence: 会议结束后，他写了一篇综述。
pinyin: Huìyì jiéshù hòu, tā xiěle yī piān zōngshù.
english: After the conference, he wrote a summary review.

sentence: 这条铁路线是跨省的大工程。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo tiělù xiàn shì kuà shěng de dà gōngchéng.
english: This railway line is a major interprovincial project.

sentence: 完成这个项目需要大约五十个工时。
pinyin: Wánchéng zhège xiàngmù xūyào dàyuē wǔshí gè gōngshí.
english: Completing this project requires about fifty man-hours.

sentence: 他不辜负大家的重托，圆满完成了任务。
pinyin: Tā bù gūfù dàjiā de zhòngtuō, yuánmǎn wánchéngle rènwù.
english: He lived up to everyone's great trust and successfully completed the mission.
